home.servicesDesc: Three integrated pillars of care that work together to bring lasting health.
home.aboutLead: For over two decades, Dr. Vyankatesh Joshi has helped patients heal from chronic and complex conditions using personalised Ayurvedic care. We focus on the root cause — not just symptom suppression — so that recovery is real and lasting.
home.treatmentsDesc: Doctor-led Ayurvedic protocols for the conditions that need the most care.
home.whyTitle: Personalised Ayurvedic Care for Lasting Health

whyItems.d: Two decades of trusted, evidence-informed Ayurvedic healing.
Treat the root cause, not just the symptoms — for lasting results.
Every patient receives a plan built around their constitution.
100% natural herbs and remedies, free from harsh chemicals.
Compassionate care that puts your well-being first.
Carefully sourced organic medicines made in-house.

section.cta: Ready to Begin Your Healing Journey?

about.heroSub: Dr. Joshi's Holistic Multispecialty Clinic has been a trusted name for personalised Ayurvedic care in Mumbai since 2004.
about.storyTitle: A Mission to Heal — Not Just Treat
about.storyP1: What began as a single-doctor clinic in 2004 has grown into a multi-branch holistic practice serving thousands of patients across India and overseas. Our philosophy has always been simple — listen carefully, address the root cause and treat with respect for both ancient wisdom and modern science.
about.storyP2: Today, our team of qualified Vaidyas, in-house pharmacy and dedicated patient-care staff work together to deliver care that is genuinely personalised — never one-size-fits-all.
about.founderRole: Founder · Holistic Multispecialty Clinic · Certified Life Coach
about.founderBio: With more than 20 years of clinical practice, Dr. Joshi specialises in Ayurvedic management of kidney disease, cancer support, infertility and chronic lifestyle conditions. He is also a certified life coach and is widely respected for his integrative, patient-first approach.

values.d: Classical formulations, prepared in-house from organic raw materials.
We tell you what is realistic — no inflated promises, no hidden costs.
The same doctor, the same plan, all the way through your healing journey.

franchise.heroSub: Bring authentic, doctor-led Ayurvedic care to your city — with the systems, brand and clinical support to succeed.
franchise.whyTitle: Why Partner with Dr. Joshi's Clinic?
franchise.whyP: Quality Ayurveda is in high demand — but patients struggle to find clinics they can trust. Our franchise model lets qualified entrepreneurs and healthcare professionals open a Dr. Joshi's centre with everything done right from day one: protocols, doctors, medicines, marketing and patient care.

benefits.d: Open under a trusted Ayurvedic name with 20+ years of clinical reputation.
Comprehensive clinical and operational training for your team.
Healthy unit economics with multiple revenue streams.
Lead generation, digital marketing and brand collaterals included.
Authentic, quality-checked formulations supplied directly to you.
Ongoing case discussions and mentorship from senior Vaidyas.

franchise.lookTitle: What We Look for in Partners
lookItems: Healthcare background or strong business experience
Suitable clinic space (600–1200 sq ft) in a good catchment
Capacity to invest in setup, equipment and working capital
Commitment to clinical quality and patient experience
Local team you can build and lead
